## Title: Fix buffer overflow vulnerability in E1AP bearer context setup

### Summary
The `cucp_cuup_bearer_context_setup_e1ap` function uses `memcpy()` to copy the `e1ap_bearer_setup_req_t` structure when preparing inter-task messages. This structure contains nested arrays for PDU sessions and DRB configurations. Using `memcpy()` on such complex structures results in shallow copying that can lead to buffer overflows when nested arrays exceed allocated bounds or contain pointer fields, causing m
